failedAssertions.reason: PDF generation fails with HTTP 500: 'Invalid color value <css function: var(--line)>'. The backend PDF renderer cannot resolve CSS custom properties (var(--line)) used in the HTML report template. The Download PDF button exists and links correctly to /api/audits/{id}/report/pdf, but the backend endpoint returns 500.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Web Browser (ui-demo)' section with available test data, page routes, audit IDs for testing, isolation rules, and agent-browser session naming conventions

frictions.description: Mock audits complete almost instantly, making it hard to capture intermediate progress states (30%, 50%). Verified via CSS inspection instead.
agent-browser fill command fails with URLs containing forward slashes on Windows. Workaround: use JavaScript eval with base64 encoding.
No 'failed' status audits exist in database. Error states verified via non-existent audit navigation (404) and code inspection of failed-state handlers.
